questions.question: A company employs a team of customer service agents to provide telephone and email support to customers.The company develops a webchat bot to provide automated answers to common customer queries.Which business benefit should the company expect as a result of creating the webchat bot solution?

options.B: a reduced workload for the customer service agents

questions.question: For a machine learning progress, how should you split data for training and evaluation?

options.A: Use features for training and labels for evaluation.
options.B: Randomly split the data into rows for training and rows for evaluation.
options.C: Use labels for training and features for evaluation.
options.D: Randomly split the data into columns for training and columns for evaluation.

options.D: A machine learning technique that analyzes data over time and identifies unusual changes.
